'''Dee Savyest''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mrlssi]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] that worked at the [[Mrlsst Trade and Science Academy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During the war, Savyest helped design parts that were used in the construction of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]] known as the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]]. However, after the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destroyed]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Savyest was overcome with denial, convincing himself that the Death Star could not possibly have been capable of destroying a planet. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Savyest met a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] that told the scientist that the first Death Star had indeed functioned properly, filling the Mrlssi with regret and sorrow.

==Biography==
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mrlssi]] that lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Dee Savyest was a [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] and researcher employed at the [[Mrlsst Trade and Science Academy]], a renowned [[University/Legends|university]] located on his [[Species/Legends|species]]' [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]]. During this [[Time/Legends|time]], prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Savyest and several other scientists helped design and build equipment that was used to construct the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]] and [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] powerful enough to destroy an entire planet. However, in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], the Empire used the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] to [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|obliterate]] the peaceful planet [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. When Savyest heard about Alderaan's demise at the hands of the Death Star, the Mrlssi scientist went into denial, refusing to believe the Death Star could have functioned properly and destroyed Alderaan. To these ends, Savyest made several calculations that he claimed "proved" that the Death Star was not capable of detonating a planet.

==Appearances==
